headline: Cisco Stock Looks Strong, But One Number Says Be Careful
summary: After an 87% run over the last year (as of June 18), it’s hard to find much fault with Cisco Systems (CSCO) stock. The company is posting record revenue, and its AI-related orders are surging. But when a stock is priced for perfection, sitting near its high, the most important signals are often the quiet ones that run counter to the main story.

headline: Exclusive: Upscale AI wants to be the next Cisco—and it just raised another $190 million
summary: The AI networking startup has now raised $500 million in under 18 months as investors bet the next infrastructure giant will emerge from the race to connect the world's AI chips.

headline: 'Big Short' Star Steve Eisman Turns Bearish On Hyperscalers (But Not Nvidia)
summary: 'Big Short' investor Steve Eisman says AI capex is turning the hyperscalers into airlines. He's still backing Nvidia, and so is Polymarket.

headline: Nvidia Isn't The Only Potential Winner From SpaceX's $85 Billion IPO
summary: SpaceX's $85 billion IPO could benefit far more than Nvidia. Here's a look at the suppliers tied to Starlink, xAI, AI infrastructure, aerospace materials, data center...
